title: Battle of Garos
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|the Galactic Civil War battle|the [[Battle at Garos IV|the Clone Wars battle]]}} {{Battle |prev=[[Mission to Sarahwiee]]''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]'' |conc= |next=Eventually: [[Pre–Shadow Hand campaign]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |image= |name=Battle of Garos |conflict=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] |date=[[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]] |place=[[Garos IV]]{{JournalCite|12|Betrayal by Knight}} |result=New Republic victory |side1=*[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] *[[Committee of Seven for Garosian Unification]] |side2=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=*[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Matt Turhaya]]†{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/fiction/shadesofgray/index.html|text="Shades of Gray"|int=Shades of Gray|newhost=Suvudu}} *[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Judder Page/Legends|Judder Page]]''[[Galaxy at War]]'' |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*[[New Republic Special Forces/Legends|New Republic Special Forces]] *[[Katarn Commandos|Page's Commandos]]{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20050407a|series=The Dark Forces Saga|text=Part 1}} **[[Kyle Katarn]] *[[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]] *[[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruisers]] *Garosian freedom fighters |forces2= |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=Light *Matt Turhaya |casual2= |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|The New Republic is winning, even as we speak. You and your fellow resistance members are to be congratulated. Garos IV is free.|[[Jaalib Brandl]]|}} The '''Battle of Garos''' occurred during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] shortly after the end of the [[Thrawn campaign]]. The planet [[Garos IV]] was freed by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] after years of intense local resistance against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. ==Background== {{Quote|There's work to be done on Garos.''"
"''You'll have some extra help now.|[[Alexandra Winger]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|{{JournalCite|6|Rendezvous with Destiny}}}} Following the death of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]], [[Alexandra Winger]], a member of the [[Committee of Seven for Garosian Unification|Garosian resistance]], was involved in a [[Mission to Sarahwiee|mission]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sarahwiee]] with [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and the [[Katarn Commandos|Page's Commandos]]. Alex Winger's actions brought [[Garos IV]]'s situation to the attention of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] which sent a fleet to Garos. [[File:Jaalib2.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[Jaalib Brandl]] meets [[Tork Winger|Tork]] and [[Alexandra Winger]] shortly before the battle.]] In preparation of the New Republic invasion, [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Jaalib Brandl]] was charged to oversee the evacuation of the Imperial dignitaries from the capital [[Ariana]]. ==The battle== {{Quote|The New Republic forces have arrived. They should be here in a few minutes.|Jaalib Brandl|}} During the beginning battle, Alexandra Winger and [[Tork Winger|her adoptive father]], the Imperial [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of Garos IV were kidnapped by Brandl who decided to betray the Empire and kill the governor. Tork Winger was severely injured but Alex managed to convince the Dark Jedi to release them. The New Republic fought the outnumbered Imperial forces on the planet, with support of the Garosian resistance. The battle was short and damage to the planet was light.''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' [[Matt Turhaya]], Alex Winger's biological father was killed during the assault. ==Aftermath== After the battle, Garos IV joined the New Republic. A prisoner exchange took place a few weeks after the battle, allowing [[Dair Haslip]] to infiltrate the Imperial forces once again. The popularity of the [[University of Garos]] caused an economic upswing of the planet during following years. ==Appearances== *{{JournalCite|12|Betrayal by Knight|reprint=1}} {{1stm}} *{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/fiction/shadesofgray/index.html|text="Shades of Gray"|int=Shades of Gray|newhost=Suvudu}} {{Mo}} {{1stID|Battle of Garos}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]'' *{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20050407a|series=The Dark Forces Saga|text=Part 1}} {{Imo}} *''[[Galaxy at War]]'' {{Imo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW 9 ABY}} {{Interlang |es=Batalla de Garos }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Garos, Battle of}} [[Category:Battles of Garos IV]] [[Category:Battles of the Galactic Civil War]]
